title: SDIP Glossary
description: Tradition-specific terminology with definitions, translations, and adoption status.

version.description: Glossary version, typically matching the bundle version.

language_primary.description: Primary language of term entries (definitions are in this language).

term.description: The canonical term as it appears in the corpus.

definition.description: Concise definition, typically <=200 characters for tooltip rendering.

adoption.description: Adoption status. 'native' = this tradition's primary vocabulary. 'tradition-specific' = used in cross-tradition contexts but doesn't lead. 'untranslatable' = preserved verbatim across translations.

translations.description: Map of language code to translated term.

source_tradition.description: Tradition the term originates from, if this tradition has adopted it from another.

aliases.description: Alternative spellings or related terms that should resolve to this entry.

deprecated.description: Term has been retired but is preserved for backward compatibility.
